description: Wrong denominator for percentage — percentages in the demographics table are calculated using the arm N instead of the total N for overall column, inflating apparent proportions.

overall.note: NOTE: Overall percentages should use N=200 as denominator. Check: 103/200=51.5% (correct), but 97/200=48.5% (also correct). These look OK but in other categories percentages may use wrong denominator.

detection_expectation.rule_violated: Percentages must use correct denominator (overall N for overall column, arm N for arm column)
detection_expectation.correct_action: Verify that all percentages are computed with the correct denominator. Cross-check category N + percentage consistency.

metadata.notes: Percentage calculations require careful denominator tracking. Common error when TFL macros have hardcoded denominator references.
